reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
강아띠가 너무 잘 놀아여 !!! 안에 삑삑이 있어서 고심다람쥐도 조아하고.. 노즈워크 네잎클로버도 안에 간식 넣어주니까 엄청 잘 놀아요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 
사실 귀여워서 제가 갖고싶어서 산거긴 한데 강아지꺼니까.. 
한 번 물려줬는데 잘 놀아서.. 고민 중 ^^. 크리야 잘 해라
reviews.content_en: My pup plays with it so well!!! It has a squeaker inside so Gosim loves it too.. and when I put treats inside the nose work four-leaf clover, she plays with it SO much lol. Honestly I bought it because it's cute and I wanted it for myself, but it's for my dog.. so I gave it to her once and she plays with it so well.. I'm torn 😅. Kureya, you did well!

reviews.name: r****
reviews.content: 너무 귀엽고 물고 있는 모습도 귀엽고 작고 귀엽고 귀엽습니다  ㅜㅜ 강쥐용 하나 소장용 하나 사이좋게 두개 구매했어요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute and the way it holds it in its mouth is cute and it's small and cute and cute ㅜㅜ I bought two - one for my dog and one for collecting!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 배송 빨랐어요~ 고심이 지대 귀여움💓 강아지 없지만 그냥 앞에 두고 볼라고 샀어용
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast~ Gosim is so incredibly cute💓 I don't have a dog but I just bought it to display in front of me!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 강아지 장난감 사면서 너무너무 귀여워서 같이 샀어요😆 진짜 보자마자 제가 너무 좋아하는 고심님 그림체를 인형 그대로 보니까 귀여워서 웃음밖에 안나와요ㅠㅠ 삑삑이 소리도 나고 울 강쥐 노즈워크도 되는 행운의 네잎클로버 가방에 귀여운 문구도 제 마음에 쏙 들어서 강쥐에게 미안하지만 이건 제가 훔쳐가려구요,,,ㅎ 가방속의 편지를 보자마자 오늘 하루 벌써 행복해졌어요-! 배송도 빠르고 실물이 훨씬 귀여워서 강쥐거랑 제거 몇 개 더 살 계획까지 생겼습니다🫶 그리고 너무 귀여워서 대빵만한 사이즈로도 나왔으면 좋겠어요!!! 최고심 x 바잇미 쵝오🤍
reviews.content_en: I bought it together while getting a dog toy because it's so so cute😆 Seriously, as soon as I saw it, I saw Gosim's art style that I love so much in the toy form and I can't stop laughing because it's so cute ㅠㅠ It makes a squeaker sound and the lucky four-leaf clover bag that also works as a nose work for my pup has cute stationery that I absolutely love, so I'm sorry to my dog but I'm planning to steal this one,,,ㅎ As soon as I saw the letter in the bag, I'm already happy today-! Shipping was fast and the actual product is even cuter, so I'm already planning to buy a few more for both my pup and myself🫶 And because it's so cute, I wish it came in a larger palm-sized version too!!! Gosim x BITE ME is the best🤍

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 너무 만족입니당 친구가 최고심 처돌이라서 선물용으로 샀는데 정말정말 좋아하더라구요 최고심을 선물받았을 웬만한 반려동물보다 제 친구가 더 좋아했을거라고 믿어의심치 않아요 등에 메고있는 네잎클로버에서 나오는 기분좋은 메세지까지 모두 만족이었습니다~ 다음에도 최고심이랑 콜라보해주세요~
reviews.content_en: I'm so satisfied~ My friend is obsessed with Gosim, so I bought it as a gift, and they really really loved it. I'm convinced my friend loved receiving Gosim more than most other people would love receiving a pet lol. I was satisfied with everything including the nice message that comes from the four-leaf clover on the back~ Please collaborate with Gosim next time too~

reviews.name: v****
reviews.content: 사랑스러워 너무 귀여워요 우리 고양이도 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: It's lovely, so cute! My cat loves it too!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
친구랑 우정템 할라구 두 개나 산거 있죠 ㅠ 
이 쳔지 보자마자 기분 좋아졌어요 🍀
일주일 안에 하나 더 살지도 몰라요
행운고심아 고마워 ❤️‍🩹
reviews.content_en: My friend and I bought two as a friendship item you know ㅠ As soon as I saw this little guy, I felt good 🍀 I might buy one more within a week. Lucky Gosim, thank you ❤️‍🩹

reviews.name: n****
reviews.content: 진짜 강아쥐는 없는데 제가 우리집 강아쥐라서 저를 위해 샀어요 암튼 용맹한 람쥐 녀석 행운 보따리 메고 위풍당당 서 있는 모습이 참으로 ㄱ ㅣ여워 미칩니다...
reviews.content_en: I don't actually have a dog but I AM the dog in my house, so I bought this for me. Anyway, that brave little squirrel standing confidently with the lucky bundle on its back is just... so incredibly cute I can't stand it...

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
저희 집엔 인간 밖에 없지만 샀어요
요즘 너무 힘들어서 저 행운 문구를 보고 홀린 듯이 사버렸네요
너무 귀여워요 이런 제품 만들어 주셔서 감사합니다
reviews.content_en: We only have humans in our house but I bought it anyway. I've been really struggling lately, so when I saw that lucky message, I got enchanted and bought it. It's so cute! Thank you for making products like this!

reviews.name: d****
reviews.content:
진짜 이 세상 귀여움이 아닙니다｡｡
옴청나게 귀엽고 뽀쨕해요 ｡°(°´ᯅ`°)°｡ 사실 저는 네잎클로버가 넘 사랑스로와서 궁ㅂ했는데 어랍쇼 곰돌탱도 눈망울이 초롱초롱해가지구 귀여워 죽겠고(◞‸◟；) 클로버는 뭐 말할 것도 없이 미치도록 귀엽습니다｡｡ 안에 부적 포인트 아이디어는 누가 낸건지 진짜 상주고싶어요｡｡ദ്ദി ˉ͈̀꒳ˉ͈́ )✨ 저희 집 몽뭉이는 본집에 있고 전 자취하는데 이걸 왜샀냐,, 저의 것이기 때문이죠,, 그녀석은 이미 10개가 넘어가는 강아지용 완구들을 가지고 있으니 요 귀요미는 제껍니댜 후후｡｡
reviews.content_en: This is seriously the cutest thing in the world｡｡ It's incredibly adorable and so precious｡°(°´ᯅ`°)°｡ Actually, I was so in love with the four-leaf clover that I was curious, but wow the bear doll has such sparkling eyes that I'm dying of cuteness(◞‸◟；) The clover doesn't even need mentioning - it's crazily cute｡｡ I really want to award whoever came up with the amulet/charm point inside｡｡ദ്ദി ˉ͈̀꒳ˉ͈́ )✨ My Mongmung is at the main house and I'm living alone in a dorm, but why did I buy this,, because it's MINE,, That pup already has over 10 dog toys anyway so this cutie is mine hehe｡｡

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
너무 귀엽고 사랑스러운 장난감이예요 :)
특히 네잎크로버의 메세지가 너무 마음에 들어요.
reviews.content_en: Such a cute and lovely toy :) I especially love the message on the four-leaf clover.

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content: 배송도 빠르고 키링 너무 귀엽네여ㅠㅠ 가격도 저렴하게 잘 구매한 것 같습니다 :)
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast and the keychain is so adorable ㅠㅠ I think I got a great deal at the price :)

reviews.name: 변****
reviews.content:
최고심을 좋아해서 반려동물은 없지만 냅다 구입했어요.
키링도 가능하다길래 신나서 가방에 달았는데
단 지 20분만에 끈이 끊어져 못 쓰게 되었네요.
잃어버릴 뻔한 걸 주변 분이 알려주셔서 겨우 찾았어요.
말도 안되는 내구성에 황당해서 별점을 낮게 하려다
디자인적으로는 만점이라 그냥 만점 드립니다.ㅠㅠ
촉감은 보드랍고 너무 예뻐요..
다만 키링으로 쓰시려는 분들은 재고해보시길 추천드려요.
그냥 인형으로만 사용하시고 달고 다니진 마세요.
달고 걷기만 했는데 그냥 툭 끊어집니다..
reviews.content_en: I love Gosim so much that even though I don't have a pet, I just went ahead and bought it. I heard the keychain attachment was possible too, so I excitedly attached it to my bag, but the string snapped after just 20 minutes and I couldn't use it anymore. I almost lost it and only found it because someone nearby pointed it out. I was shocked by the terrible durability and wanted to give it a low rating, but since the design is perfect, I'm just giving it full marks instead ㅠㅠ The texture is so soft and pretty... However, I'd recommend reconsidering if you're planning to use it as a keychain. Just use it as a plushie and don't carry it around with you. Just from walking around with it, the string just snapped...

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
귀여운 고심이 택배 파업 때문에 머나먼곳에서 삼일동안 얼마나 고생했는지 생각하면 진자 눈물 납니다ㅠㅠㅠ
저도 갖고싶어서(…) 두개샀어요! 행운고심 사랑해ㅠㅠㅠ
조금 아쉬운건 얼굴 마감이 조금 엉성한것 같아요. 족곰한 녀석이라 금방 망가질까 불안합니다.
하지만 괜찮아요 귀여우니까 봐주기로🥰
reviews.content_en: Thinking about how much cute Gosim suffered stuck in transit for three days because of the delivery strike makes me cry for real ㅠㅠㅠ I wanted one too so I bought two! Love you Lucky Gosim ㅠㅠㅠ The only thing I'm a bit disappointed about is that the face finish seems a bit sloppy. Since it's a delicate thing, I'm worried it'll break easily. But it's okay, it's so cute I'll overlook it 🥰

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content: 완전 좋아해요 핵좋아하고 튼튼해서 좋습니다 배송도 빠르고 간식 숨겨둘수잇어서 틈새 노즈워크 가능해용
reviews.content_en: I absolutely love it, I really really love it and it's so durable that's great too! Shipping was fast and I can hide treats in it for some quick nose work sessions 🥰

reviews.name: 심****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여운 노즈워크 샀어요 ~ 우리 요미넘 좋아하네요 크기도 좋고 넘 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: I got such a cute nose work toy ~ My Yomi really loves it! The size is perfect and it's so adorable

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content:
ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ미친귀여움임 사진보다 훨씬 귀여워요 
생일선물로 산건데 반응이 너무 기대됩니닼ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 퍼스널컬러라 잘어울릴거같아요 하 심장아플정도로 귀여움♡♡♡♡♡
reviews.content_en: ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ Insanely cute, way cuter in person than in the photos! I bought it as a birthday gift and I can't wait to see their reaction ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ It's my personal color so it should look perfect on them, oh the cuteness is literally heartbreaking ♡♡♡♡♡

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 인형 사주면 바로 잘 안가지고 노는데 ㅋㅋ 최고심 인형은 바로 반응오네요~ 가지고노는 모습이 넘 귀여워요 ㅠㅠㅠ 그리고 속에 간식 숨겨 놓으니까 집착이 장난아니에여 ㅠㅠㅠ 넘 귀엽고 ㅠㅠ 섬세한 디테일까지 완전 만족합니다~ 또 구매할래요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Usually my pup doesn't play much with toys I buy, but ㅋㅋ with this Gosim plushie they immediately started playing with it ~ It's so cute watching them play with it ㅠㅠㅠ And since I hid treats inside, they're absolutely obsessed with it ㅠㅠㅠ So cute and ㅠㅠ I'm completely satisfied even with the delicate details ~ I'm going to buy it again ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content: 멍냥이를 키우지 않는 인간이 .... 이 인형이 나왔다는 소식을 듣자마자 ..... 망설이지 않고 구매를 잽싸게 했습니다 ㅋㅋㅋ아 역시 생각한대로 너무 귀엽고 네잎클로버ㅠ미쳐요 증말 탈부착 되는게 너무 귀여움 그냥 사랑해요 많이 파세요 많이많이
reviews.content_en: As someone who doesn't have a dog or cat.... the moment I heard this plushie came out..... I didn't hesitate and bought it right away ㅋㅋㅋ Ah, it's exactly as adorable as I thought, and the four-leaf clover ㅠ I'm obsessed! The detachable part is just so cute. I just love it. Please sell a lot more, lots and lots!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 애가 좀 찌그러진 거 같은 느낌적인 느낌이지만 넘 귀엽고 친구가 최고심 좋아해서 만족해요ㅎㅎ 무엇보다 배송이 엄청 빨랐어요!!!
reviews.content_en: The plushie looks a bit squished but it's so cute and my friend loves Gosim so I'm satisfied ㅎㅎ Most importantly, the shipping was incredibly fast!!!

reviews.name: 선****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여운 키링이네요! 강아지 노즈워크용이지만....최고심을 좋아하는 친구에게 선물해줬어요 ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Such a cute keychain! 🐕 It's supposed to be for dog nose work, but I gave it to a friend who loves cute things hehe

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content: 넘넘넘 긔여워요... 키링 달려있어서 반려동물이 없더라도 인형으로 활용할 수 있어서 좋아요! 친구 주려고 두개샀는데 다른친구가 탐내서 하나 더 구매하려구요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 소리나는지는 몰랐는데 삑삑이 들어있어서 소리도 나요 졸귀 ㅠㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: So so SO cute... 😍 It has a keychain attached, so you can use it as a plushie even without a pet! I bought two to give to friends, but another friend wants one too so I'm about to order another one lol 😂 I didn't know it made sounds, but it has a squeaker inside so it does! So adorable 🥺🥺🥺

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
행운의 쪽지에 간식 돌돌 말아서 노즈워크 해주면
좋아해요 다람쥐엔 삑삑이 있어서 좋구요
클로바는 벨크로로 붙일 수 있어 좋아요
reviews.content_en: My pet loves it when I do nose work by rolling treats in the lucky note! 🐿️ The squirrel has a squeaker which is great, and the clover can be attached with velcro which is convenient!

reviews.name: 하****
reviews.content:
키링으로 사용하려고 구매했어요!
생각보단 작지만 귀여우니까 괜찮아요
reviews.content_en: I bought it to use as a keychain! It's smaller than I thought, but it's so cute so it's fine 😊

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 진짜진짜 귀여워요 ㅎㅎ 귀여워서 제가 써요
reviews.content_en: It's really really cute 😊 It's so cute that I use it myself!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 넘 이쁘고 귀엽고 사랑스러운 행운다람쥐
reviews.content_en: So beautiful and cute and lovely lucky squirrel 🍀

reviews.name: d****
reviews.content: 너무너무너무 귀엽구요 배송도 하루가 안돼서 도착해서 넘 행복했습니다 다만 가방에 달고 다니다가 클로버 가방이 헐거운 편이라 그런지 잃어버렸어요ㅜㅠㅠ 다시 사려구요.. 구매하실분들은 안잃어버리게 조심하세요
reviews.content_en: It's way too cute 🥰 The shipping was super fast too - it arrived in less than a day and I was so happy! But I lost it while carrying it on my bag because the clover bag's attachment was a bit loose 😭😭 I'm planning to buy it again.. For those thinking of buying it, be careful not to lose it!

reviews.name: c****
reviews.content: 정말 귀엽고 제게 행운을 가져다 줄 것 같아요 강아지 간식 제공하는 인형 용도인데 인터넷에서 보고 귀여워서 강아지 안키우지만 제가 가지려고 주문했습니다 다람쥐 꼬리가 특히 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: It's really cute and I think it'll bring me good luck! 🍀 It's a toy for dog treats, but I saw it online and thought it was so adorable that I ordered one even though I don't have a dog. The squirrel's tail is especially cute! 🐿️

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저희집엔 사람 말곤 생명체가 없어요. 절 위해 샀답니다. 부적처럼 들고 다니려고요 ㅎㅎ 너무 귀여워요.. 그리고 아기자기하게 디테일도 좋아요... 쪽지천이 너무 보드라워서 자꾸 만지고 싶어져요
reviews.content_en: There are no living creatures in our house except people. So I bought this for myself! I'm planning to carry it around like a lucky charm 😊 It's so cute.. and the details are so nice too... The fabric is so soft that I keep wanting to touch it 💕

reviews.name: o****
reviews.content:
하 너무 귀여워서 못살갰습니다... 재입고되기만을 기다렸는데 배송도 24시간만에 와서 깜짝 놀랐어요... 
저희 집에 귀여운 멍멍이는 없지만 술취하면 제가 개가 되니까 만족합니다^^ 왈왈!
reviews.content_en: Oh no, it's so cute I couldn't resist buying it... 😭 I waited for it to be restocked and it arrived within 24 hours so I was shocked... We don't have a cute doggy at home, but when I'm drunk I become a dog anyway so I'm satisfied 😄 Woof woof! 🐕

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 초록색 잎사귀? 벨크로부분 열어서 먹을줄알았는데 옆에 비짓고 얼굴넣고 빼먹네요...ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Green leaf? I thought it would open at the velcro part so the puppy could eat it, but instead they just visit it and stick their face in and out... lol

reviews.name: e****
reviews.content:
자수가 깔끔하지 않아서 다듬어 줬어요
귀여워요 ♡ 
몸에 삑삑이 있는줄 몰랐는데 삑삑이 있어서 더 귀여워요 
편지에 글자가 스티커 처럼 붙어있는게 아니라 아예 염색?되어 있어서 좋네요
reviews.content_en: The embroidery wasn't very neat so I tidied it up. It's so cute ♡ I didn't know there was a squeaker in the body, but it's even cuter because it has one. The letters on the note aren't stickers but actually dyed on, which is nice

reviews.name: d****
reviews.content:
강아지는 없지만..
귀여운 최고심 행운다람쥐 네잎 클로바에 꽂혀 구입했습니다..
...하지만...혼잡한 퇴근길...
지하철에서 다람쥐 등딱지에 있는 
찍찍이 클로버를 잃어버렸읍니다....너무 슬퍼요... 
행운 다람쥐가 아닌 그냥 다람쥐를 달고 다닙니다ㅠ^ㅠ 흑흑 분실신고 했는데..찾고싶네요ㅠㅠ 
5월18일 서울 지하철 1호선에서 잃어버렸어요~~~!!

참고로 네잎 클로버 안에 새콤달콤3개도 넣어놨었어요,,,^^;
reviews.content_en:
I don't have a dog, but... I was so obsessed with this adorable GOSH-SIM lucky squirrel four-leaf clover that I bought it... but then... on my crowded commute home... I lost the velcro clover on the squirrel's back on the Seoul subway Line 1...I'm so sad... Now I'm carrying around just a regular squirrel instead of a lucky one ㅠ^ㅠ I filed a lost report but I really want to find it ㅠㅠ I lost it on Seoul subway Line 1 on May 18th~~~!!

By the way, I had also put 3 Sweet & Sour candies inside the four-leaf clover too,,,^^;

reviews.name: e****
reviews.content:
역시 택배 받자마자 자기껀 줄 암ㅎㅎ
포장지 뜯기 무섭게 잘 가지고 놀아요~
인형이 너무 귀여워 제가 갖고 싶었지만 저리 좋아하는 울 강아지에게 양보를^^
reviews.content_en: As soon as I got the package, my pup immediately knew it was theirs lol. They started playing with it as soon as I tore open the wrapper~ The plushie is so cute that I wanted to keep it for myself, but I gave in to how much my doggy loves it^^

reviews.name: c****
reviews.content:
최고최고... 최고심이 내 인생을 행복하게 해준다..
뜯자마자 그냥 소리 질렀습니더..
진짜 왜이엃게 귀여운건데 ?

사실 네잎클로버만 보고 냅다 구매한건데
고심이 인형짜식 너무 귀여워 .....
하나만 구매한게 한이 됩니다..

울집강쥐한테 주려고 산 건 아니지만
받고나니 더 주지않으려고요..
강쥐가 탐낼까봐 혼자 몰래 보고있어요

진짜 너무 귀여워 .....
만들어주소셔서 넘 감사해요
reviews.content_en:
The best... the best... GOSH-SIM makes my life so happy.. I literally screamed as soon as I opened it... Seriously, why is it THIS cute? 

Honestly, I just bought it on impulse after seeing the four-leaf clover, but GOSH-SIM plushie is SO cute..... I regret only buying one..

I didn't buy this for my pup, but now I don't want to give it to her.. I'm worried my doggy will covet it so I'm secretly looking at it alone lol

It's seriously so cute..... Thank you so much for making it

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 정말 귀여운 제품입니다!! 특히 행운의 편지가 숨어있다니 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: It's a really cute product!! Especially with the lucky letter hidden inside haha

reviews.name: k****
reviews.content: 일단 귀엽습니다. 열어보면 더 귀엽고 그냥 가만히 던져둬도 귀여운고예요. 현재는 비록 ㅠㅠ 강아지없는 내가 2개사서 1개 나하고 1개는 선물줬답니다 ^^^^
reviews.content_en: First of all, it's adorable. It's even cuter when you open it, and it's cute even if you just leave it lying around. Right now, even though I don't have a dog ㅠㅠ I bought 2 and kept 1 for myself and gave 1 as a gift^^^^

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여운데 클로버는 절반이 튿어져있었고, 최고심 뒤통수도 실 마감이 너무 허접하네요..ㅠ
키링 가격이 저렴한건 아니지만 실 뜯어져 있는거 보고 실망했어요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute but the clover was half torn, and the back of GOSH-SIM's head has really sloppy thread finishing..ㅠ The keyring isn't cheap but I was disappointed seeing the thread coming apart

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여워요! 하지만 마감이 너무 아쉬워요.
눈 실밥 튀어나오고 네잎클로버 가방은 바느질이 덜 되어서 손질했어요ㅠ 만원 넘는 키링인데 마감이 실망스러워요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! But the finishing is really disappointing. The eye stitches are poking out and the four-leaf clover bag had incomplete stitching so I had to fix it ㅠ For a keyring over 10,000 won, the finishing is really disappointing

reviews.name: d****
reviews.content: 그냥 본품 곰인형도 너무 귀엽구요.. 다른 인형친구한테 네잎클로버 매봤는데 와라러라랄 먹고 싶었어요 너무 귀여웠습니다 귯 •••
reviews.content_en: The actual plushie is super cute too.. I attached the four-leaf clover to another plushie friend and they looked so adorable I wanted to eat them up lol Super cute •••

reviews.name: f****
reviews.content:
첨에 받았을 때 너무 귀여워서 
바로 끼고 댕기고 있는데요…
갑자기 네잎클로버 냐석이 도망갔어여 ㅠㅠ
버스에 놓고 내린 거 같아서 분실신고 했는데
돌아오겠뎌…? 내가 잘 다룰게.. 다시 돌아와
네잎클로버야..
reviews.content_en: When I first got it, it was so cute that I put it on right away and have been carrying it around... but suddenly Nayeop the four-leaf clover ran away ㅠㅠ I think I left it on the bus, so I filed a lost report, but will it come back...? I'll take better care of it... please come back, four-leaf clover...

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content: 인형 넘 귀엽구 강아지가 잘 가지고 놀아요ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The plushie is so cute and my dog loves playing with it ㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저는 강아지 장난감이 아니라,, 저의,, 저만의,, 장난감이기 위해서 구입했답니다,, ㅎㅎ 너무 귀여워요,, 카카오톡 선물하기에 있다가 사라졌던데,, 또 재입고 해주시면 좋을 것 같아요,, 친구한테 선물해주기 좋았는데 아쉬워요 🥲
reviews.content_en: I didn't buy this as a dog toy, but as MY OWN toy 😄 It's so adorable... it was on KakaoTalk gift service but disappeared... I wish you'd restock it! It would've been great to give to a friend but that's unfortunate 🥲

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content: 일단 인형은 귀여운 게 먼저라고 생각하는데요 너무 귀엽습니다!! 생각보다 더 귀여워요!! 다른 작은 인형들을 많이 가지고 있어서 클로버 가방을 겟하려고 산 건데 인형이 너무 마음에 드네요 ㅠㅠ 누르면 삑삑 소리도 나고(포인트 잘 맞춰서 세게 눌러줘야 하긴 합니다) 눈 초롱초롱한 게 귀여워요 ㅋㅋㅋ 원래 최고심 캐릭터 좋아해서 만족도가 더 높습니다 인형 좋아하시는 분들께 강추~!
reviews.content_en: I think a plushie should be cute first of all, and this one is SO cute!! Even cuter than I expected!! I have lots of other small plushies and bought this mainly to get the clover bag, but I absolutely love the plushie ㅠㅠ It makes a squeaky sound when you press it (you do have to press the right spot firmly though) and the sparkling eyes are so adorable ㅋㅋㅋ I already love the character so I'm even more satisfied! Highly recommend to anyone who loves plushies~!

reviews.name: r****
reviews.content: 이걸 창작한 사람은 정말 최고의 <귀여운것> 발명가 상을 줘야한다고 생각합니다 네잎클로버 안에 고이고이 숨겨진 행운의 쪽지가 오타쿠를 울림.. 앤나 이 클로버를 야무지게 엎고 있는 아주 의젓하고 멋진 다람쥐도 미치게 귀여움...
reviews.content_en: I think whoever created this deserves an award for being the ultimate inventor of cuteness 😭 The lucky note hidden so carefully inside the four-leaf clover is heartwarming... and the squirrel holding onto this clover so dutifully and looking so dignified is absolutely adorable...

reviews.name: f****
reviews.content:
반려 생명도 없는데 너무 귀여워서 사버렸어요
다람쥐 키링은 가방에 달고 다니고 클로바 가방은 다른 인형에게 주었답니다.. 너무 귀엽고 사랑스러워요
reviews.content_en: I don't even have a pet but it was so cute I just had to buy it 💕 I'm carrying the squirrel keychain on my bag and gave the clover bag to another plushie... It's so cute and lovable!

reviews.name: p****
reviews.content: 전 모시는 고영희와 갱얼쥐가 없습니다 순전히 귀여워서 제 거로 샀다는 말이죠.. 너무 귀엽고요.. 귀엽고 귀여워요..
reviews.content_en: I don't have Goyeonghee or any hamsters... I bought this purely because it was so cute, is what I mean to say 😆 It's so cute... just cute and cute and cute...

reviews.name: p****
reviews.content: 받자마자 너무 귀여웠어요 ㅠㅠㅠ 디테일도 살아있고 너무 맘에 듭니다 !! 배송도 하루만에 와서 넘 행복해요 ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It was so cute the moment I got it ㅠㅠㅠ The details are so alive and I love it so much!! Plus the shipping came in just one day so I'm over the moon ㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: d****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요.. 반려동물은 없지만... 인형 자체로 너무 귀여워서 구매했어요~~! 볼때마다 정말 행복해지는 기분이네요 강추...♡♡♡
reviews.content_en: It's so cute... I don't have a pet but the plushie itself was so adorable that I bought it~~! Every time I look at it I feel genuinely happy ♡♡♡

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요... 사고 싶어서 재입고 될 때까지 거의 한 3주? 기다린 것 같아요 강아지는 없지만 제가 잘 가지고 다니려구요🍀
reviews.content_en: It's so cute... I wanted it so badly that I think I waited like 3 weeks for it to be restocked? I don't have a dog but I'll be taking good care of this and carrying it around with me 🍀
